mapper.select: /*AdminMng_SQL.selectAdminMenuInfo*/ SELECT MENU_ID , MENU_P_ID , MENU_NM , MENU_USE_YN , MENU_DEL_YN , MENU_CN , MENU_URL , MENU_LVL , MENU_SORT , MENU_DEPT_CD , MENU_TEAM_CD , MENU_POSITION_CD , REG_ID , REG_DT , UPD_ID , UPD_DT FROM TB_ADMIN_MENU_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND MENU_USE_YN = 'Y' AND MENU_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MENU_LVL = 0 ORDER BY MENU_SORT

/*AdminMng_SQL.selectAdminMenuInfo2*/ SELECT MENU_ID , MENU_P_ID , MENU_NM , MENU_USE_YN , MENU_DEL_YN , MENU_CN , MENU_URL , MENU_LVL , MENU_SORT , MENU_DEPT_CD , MENU_TEAM_CD , MENU_POSITION_CD , REG_ID , REG_DT , UPD_ID , UPD_DT FROM TB_ADMIN_MENU_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND MENU_USE_YN = 'Y' AND MENU_DEL_YN = 'N' AND MENU_LVL = 1 ORDER BY MENU_SORT
/*AdminMng_SQL.selectAdminMainNoticeRegCnt*/ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NOTICE_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND NOTICE_DEL_YN = 'N' AND REG_DT >= CURRENT_DATE AND REG_DT < CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day'

/*AdminMng_SQL.selectAdminMainNoticeList*/ SELECT A.NOTICE_ID , A.NOTICE_TITLE , A.NOTICE_EFFECT_GB , A.NOTICE_CN , A.NOTICE_FIX_YN , A.NOTICE_LIMIT_YN , TO_CHAR(A.NOTICE_STR_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MM:SS') AS NOTICE_STR_DT , TO_CHAR(A.NOTICE_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MM:SS') AS NOTICE_END_DT , A.NOTICE_FINISH_YN , A.NOTICE_DEL_YN , A.NOTICE_POP_YN , A.REG_ID , TO_CHAR(A.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DT , A.UPD_ID , A.UPD_DT FROM TB_NOTICE_INFO A WHERE 1=1 AND A.NOTICE_DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.REG_DT DESC
